privileged_info_summary: The lens_flare task uses real Unsplash photographs as input data: a mountain/fog landscape (800x533) from photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 and an Icelandic valley landscape (800x534) from photo-1472214103451-9374bd1c798e, with a fallback to generated 800x600 image. The task verifies lens flare application by analyzing brightness increases using pixel-level comparison: requiring ≥200 pixels with >30 intensity increase, peak brightness ≥240, localized effect (<15% of image), upper 60% positioning, and ≥2% meaningful pixel changes. The GIMP Lens Flare filter is located at Filters→Light and Shadow→Lens Flare per official GIMP 2.10 documentation. Task has 120-second timeout, 8-step maximum, and 75% pass threshold. Output is saved to /home/ga/Desktop/lens_flare_effect.jpg.
